summary: Enhanced System Audit Report testing completed. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All critical features verified. The system audit report successfully collects data from multiple sources (void_audit_logs, role_audit_logs, audit_logs, ingredient_audit_logs, shifts, etc.) and displays 100 activities with 8 event types. Filter dropdown, clickable type badges, and activity table all working correctly.

backend: test_system_audit_has_by_type_with_counts - Response includes by_type with count per type
test_system_audit_filter_nota_credito - event_type=Nota de Credito filters correctly
test_system_audit_activities_have_required_fields - Activities have timestamp, type, description, user, authorizer, value
test_system_audit_collects_from_multiple_sources - Data comes from multiple MongoDB collections
test_system_audit_summary_totals - Summary contains total_activities and total_value
frontend: Auditoría y Operaciones category expands correctly
Auditoría General del Sistema report shows in left menu
Filter dropdown has data-testid='audit-event-filter' and shows 'Todos los eventos' as default
Filter dropdown lists all 8 event types: Anulacion, Apertura de Turno, Movimiento de Ingrediente, Nota de Credito, Puesto Creado, Puesto Eliminado, Usuario Creado, Usuario Eliminado
8 clickable colored type badges shown in 'RESUMEN POR TIPO DE ACTIVIDAD' section
Activity table has columns: Hora, Tipo, Descripcion, Usuario, Autorizado por, Valor
Clicking type badge filters the report and shows 'Limpiar filtro' button
Summary cards show 'TOTAL ACTIVIDADES' (100) and 'VALOR TOTAL INVOLUCRADO' (RD$ 17,087.78)

verified_data_sources: role_audit_logs - Usuario Creado/Eliminado, Puesto Creado/Eliminado events
audit_logs - Nota de Credito events (4 activities)
ingredient_audit_logs - Movimiento de Ingrediente events (46 activities)
shifts - Apertura de Turno events (2 activities)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_system_audit_report.py - Created test suite for system audit endpoint
seed_data_creation: None - used existing audit data from 9 collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: System Audit Report enhanced with 9 data sources tested. Endpoint: GET /api/reports/system-audit?date_from=2025-01-01&date_to=2026-12-31&event_type=X. Event types from: void_audit_logs (Anulacion), role_audit_logs (Usuario/Puesto Creado/Eliminado), audit_logs (Nota de Credito), ingredient_audit_logs (Movimiento de Ingrediente), shifts (Apertura de Turno). Frontend filters work via dropdown and clickable badges. Report is at /reports -> Auditoría y Operaciones -> Auditoría General del Sistema.
